title: Improve document section visual design and add preview icon

requirements.text: Redesign the DocumentsSection component to have a cleaner, more visually appealing layout with improved spacing, typography, and visual hierarchy

quotes: make the document section cleaner and more visually appealing

acceptanceCriteria: Document cards have improved visual spacing and alignment
Typography is clearer and more readable
Layout has better visual hierarchy distinguishing document metadata
Overall section appears more polished and professional

requirements.text: Add a document preview icon to each document entry in the DocumentsSection component that visually represents the document type
acceptanceCriteria: Each document card displays an appropriate preview icon
Icon is positioned consistently within the document card layout
Icon visually represents the document type (e.g., file, PDF, image)

constraints: Maintain the existing document data structure with name, type, and upload date fields
Keep the upload and scan button functionality intact
Do not modify backend document handling logic
nonGoals: Changing the dummy document data structure
